title: Village Life
description: Transform your Minecraft world with lively and emotional villagers!
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88dbbbc1829b0df947aff453ff4c6e4042bf8de0_0.webp)
### Village Life enriches your Minecraft experience by bringing villagers to life with dynamic emotions and engaging interactions!


## Unique Names
![name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8683e84d310f16a1798fe78a94bda537ec8bd8de.png)

Every villager is assigned a **unique first and last name**, giving them **personality and making your interactions more memorable**.

## Villager Emotions
![emotion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bfb34fc200be09d1a4974df0ec969234896bf7f.png)

Experience five distinct **emotions—happy, angry, tired, curious, and sad**—that influence villagers' behavior and responses to players.

## Temporary Effects

**Depending on the villager’s mood**, players receive **special effects** (like Regeneration, Weakness, or Slowness) to enhance immersion.

## Rewards
Interact with villagers to receive **unique items** such as bread, emeralds, flowers, or rare objects, **reflecting their emotional state**.

## Uninstalling
Ready to say goodbye to the Datapack? No problem! Simply follow these **simple steps**:

1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
```
/function v_life:uninstall
```
3. You can now remove it safely from the Datapacks folder, every trace of the datapack has been removed.

### Additional Notes
- Compatible with all other datapacks, following the standard conventions.
- This datapack was coded using JMC
